Ibn Haldun Academy '25 Program Completed with Prof. Dr. İbrahim Kalın's Closing Lecture

26.05.2025

The last week sessions of Ibn Haldun Academy this year ended with Prof. Dr. İbrahim Kalın's Closing Lecture after the seminars and conferences of Taha Burak Toprak, Alev Erkilet and Kübra Güran Yiğitbaşı.

The 6th week sessions of Ibn Haldun Academy, which was organized for the third time this year with the theme of “Developing Culture and Ecosystem” and focused on cultural atmosphere issues, were held on Saturday, May 24, 2025 at Ibn Haldun University Complex.

The Ibn Haldun Academy '25 program, which attracted nearly 1,000 participants from 140 different universities, started on April 19 and every Saturday for 6 weeks, participants from all universities in Istanbul were able to follow the program face-to-face and participants from Anatolia were able to follow it online simultaneously. In its last week, the Academy witnessed seminars and conferences, which the participants benefited from intensively.

Prof. Dr. İbrahim Kalın, the President of the National Intelligence Organization, gave the Closing Lecture; Assoc. Prof. Kübra Güran Yiğitbaşı, the Governor of Afyonkarahisar, gave a lecture; and the final sessions of the seminars of Dr. Taha Burak Toprak and Prof. Alev Erkilet were held.
